L1_headline: + HOLX – Anne M. Liddy disposed of 185 shares (tax withholding on RSU vesting). | 02/27/2026
L2_brief: Anne M. Liddy, General Counsel of Hologic Inc, had 185 shares of common stock withheld on 02/27/2026 at $75.36 per share to cover tax obligations upon the settlement of restricted stock units. Following the transaction, Liddy directly holds 28,052 shares of common stock.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a routine tax withholding disposition associated with the vesting and settlement of restricted stock units (RSUs). Transaction code 'F' indicates shares withheld by the issuer to satisfy tax obligations, not a discretionary sale. The 185 shares disposed represent a small fraction (approximately 0.66%) of Liddy's total direct holdings of 28,052 shares.
risks_flagged: Transaction is a mandatory tax withholding (code F), not a discretionary sale
